visual_summary: A login card with a shine border effect. Typically used for login or sign-up forms. The shine border is conditional based on the system theme.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: Shine Border Demo 2
Description: A login card with a shine border effect. Typically used for login or sign-up forms. The shine border is conditional based on the system theme.
Style: dark mode supported, shine border
Interactions: conditional based on system theme
Tags: login, form, ui component

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):

import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label"
import { ShineBorder } from "@/registry/magicui/shine-border"

  return (
